content.thinking:
Patrol count is 19, no extraordinary action. The current patrol wisp (skogtown-wisp-wisp-09wprr) has all 4 steps complete. The hooked wisp (skogtown-wisp-wisp-07qybh) also has all children complete.

According to the rules:
- If `patrol_count >= 20` → hand off
- We're at 19, so one more patrol would put us at 20

The current patrol is complete. I need to squash it and decide whether to loop or hand off. Since we're at 19 patrols, doing one more would hit 20, which means I should do one more patrol cycle and then hand off.


Now I'll squash the current wisp and spin up a new patrol to reach that threshold.

content.text: Patrol count at 19, all steps complete on current wisp. One more cycle before handoff threshold. Let me squash this completed patrol and start a fresh cycle.
